subcodes.first_line: O loving friend! Let not the multitude of tribulations and afflictions cause thee to falter, but rather increase thou thy joy and gladness. Praise be to God that through His grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار مهربان از کثرت مصائب و بلا فتور میار بلکه بر فرح و سرور بیفزا حمد خدا را که به فضل
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @call to action, @firmness in the Covenant
